lines.english: Did the detectives save the diamonds?
lines.raw: Did the detectives save the diamonds? | 侦探们保住钻石了吗？

lines.english: The plane was late and detectives were waiting at the airport all morning.
lines.chinese: 飞机晚点了，侦探们在机场等了一上午。
lines.raw: The plane was late and detectives were waiting at the airport all morning. | 飞机晚点了，侦探们在机场等了一上午。

lines.english: They were expecting a valuable parcel of diamonds from South Africa.
lines.chinese: 他们正在等一个从南非寄来的贵重钻石包裹。
lines.raw: They were expecting a valuable parcel of diamonds from South Africa. | 他们正在等一个从南非寄来的贵重钻石包裹。
A few hours earlier, | 几个小时前，

lines.english: someone had told the police that
lines.raw: someone had told the police that | 有人告诉警方，

lines.english: thieves would try to steal the diamonds.
lines.chinese: 小偷会设法偷走这些钻石。
lines.raw: thieves would try to steal the diamonds. | 小偷会设法偷走这些钻石。
When the plane arrived, | 飞机抵达时，

lines.english: some of the detectives were waiting
lines.raw: some of the detectives were waiting | 一些侦探在
inside the main building | 主楼里等候，

lines.english: while others were waiting on the airfield.
lines.chinese: 另一些则在机场跑道上等候。
lines.raw: while others were waiting on the airfield. | 另一些则在机场跑道上等候。

lines.english: Two men took the parcel off the plane
lines.chinese: 两名男子把包裹从飞机上卸下来，
lines.raw: Two men took the parcel off the plane | 两名男子把包裹从飞机上卸下来，

lines.english: and carried it into the Customs House.
lines.raw: and carried it into the Customs House. | 并把它搬进了海关。

lines.english: While two detectives were keeping guard at the door,
lines.raw: While two detectives were keeping guard at the door, | 两名侦探在门口守卫，
two others opened the parcel. | 另外两名打开了包裹。
To their surprise, | 令他们吃惊的是，

lines.english: the precious parcel was full of stones and sand!
lines.chinese: 这个贵重包裹里装满了石头和沙子！
lines.raw: the precious parcel was full of stones and sand! | 这个贵重包裹里装满了石头和沙子！
